title: 7 Herbal Teas for Shift Workers with Adrenal Fatigue
description: Schisandra chinensis teas have been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine to help with adrenal fatigue. Adrenal fatigue is a condition where the adrenal glands are exhausted, leading to fatigue, insomnia, and weight changes. Schisandra chinensis teas contain properties and constituents like schisandrins, lignans, and polysaccharides, which help to nourish and support the adrenal glands. These compounds also have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to ...
